title: Slime Block in the Redstone Tab
description: Puts the slime block into the Redstone tab, where it belongs. That's it. Not needed serverside, client only.
body:
This mod has two config files, one for moving items/tags to tabs, and another for creating new tabs.
To move an item, type `namespace:item : TAB` into `slimeblock_item_config.txt`. To move a tag, type `#namespace:tag : TAB` into `slimeblock_item_config.txt`.

To create a new tab, type `your_namespace:tab_name : namespace:logo_item` into `slimeblock_group_config.txt`.

The config files are auto generated.
